name: Dracotail Sting
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>星辰の刺毒</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ドラゴンテイル・スティング</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 monster and/or 1 Spell/Trap in your opponent's GY; banish them, then you can place 1 "Dracotail" card from your GY or banishment on the bottom of your Deck, except "Dracotail Sting", then draw 1 card. You can only activate 1 "Dracotail Sting" per turn.
eff: Target 1 monster and/or 1 Spell/Trap in your opponent's GY; banish them, then you can place 1 "Dracotail" card from your GY or banishment on the bottom of your Deck, except "Dracotail Sting", then draw 1 card. You can only activate 1 "Dracotail Sting" per turn.

action: Places cards from the player's Graveyard on the bottom of the Deck
Places the player's banished cards on the bottom of the Deck
